why: The shadcn CLI is the fastest path to new components but the monorepo layout (components live in packages/ui, not in an app) makes standard setup inapplicable — every new component had to be manually copied and alias paths manually fixed.

intended_outcome.statement: A working components.json in packages/ui so npx shadcn@latest add <component> --cwd packages/ui installs new components directly into packages/ui/src/components/atoms/shadcn/ with correct alias resolution and no manual post-edit needed. Workflow documented in packages/ui/AGENTS.md.
